race.comment: CRUSADER VOYAGE (1) was a touch disappointing last time out but the form prior was full of merit. Gets the services of gun hoop Maloney in the irons and rates a top contender against this line-up. I SAY I SAY (7) did his best work late last time over 1600m at this track, finishing fifth. Ready to peak after four runs back and rates a danger. SOMETHING SHINY (2) has been thereabouts at both runs this prep. Not a bad effort last start to finish 2.5 lengths away in third over 1300m at Toowoomba three weeks ago. Ready to peak at the third run in. HELL OF A HIGH (8) ran an improved race finishing midfield last start at this track on soft going and is up in distance, worthy of a place.
